description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:1.6 Docker image, setting the MIX_ENV variable to test and running make hex as a global before_script. Define three stages—Setup, Build, and Test. In the Setup stage add a deps job that runs make deps and stores the deps directory and mix.lock as artifacts for 30 minutes. In the Build stage add a compile job that depends on deps, runs make compile, and publishes the _build directory as a 30‑minute artifact. In the Test stage add a lint job (allow_failure) that depends on deps and compile and runs make lint, and a tests job that also depends on deps and compile, runs make test, uses a mongo:3.6 service, and captures test coverage with the regex /\[TOTAL\]\s+(\d+\.\d+)%/.
